name: meeting-ai-anna
description: Detects questions in a meeting transcript, answers them, and writes a recap with action items, owners and next steps — via Anna host sampling. No API key.
author: ThavionAI

tools.name: detect_question
tools.description: Decide whether a transcript chunk contains a real question.

tools.name: answer_question
tools.description: Answer a question using the meeting context.

tools.name: summarize_meeting
tools.description: Recap a transcript: summary, action items + owners, next steps, decisions.
